net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface LuggageProperties

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    LuggagePropertiesImpl

    public interface LuggageProperties
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject
    A representation of the model object 'Luggage Properties'.

    The following features are supported:

    • Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Mean
    • Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Deviation
    • Percentage Of Passengers With No Luggage
    • Percentage Of Passengers With Small Luggage
    • Percentage Of Passengers With Medium Luggage
    • Percentage Of Passengers With Big Luggage
    • Passenger Small Luggage Stow Time Mean
    • Passenger Small Luggage Stow Time Deviation
    • Passenger Medium Luggage Stow Time Mean
    • Passenger Medium Luggage Stow Time Deviation
    • Passenger Big Luggage Stow Time Mean
    • Passenger Big Luggage Stow Time Deviation
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getLuggageProperties()

    • Method Detail

      • getLuggageStowDistanceFromSeatMean

        double getLuggageStowDistanceFromSeatMean()
        Returns the value of the 'Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Mean' attribute. The default value is "80".

        If the meaning of the 'Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Mean' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Mean' attribute.
        See Also:
        setLuggageStowDistanceFromSeatMean(double), CabinPackage.getLuggageProperties_LuggageStowDistanceFromSeatMean()

      • setLuggageStowDistanceFromSeatMean

        void setLuggageStowDistanceFromSeatMean(double value)
        Sets the value of the 'Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Mean' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Mean' attribute.
        See Also:
        getLuggageStowDistanceFromSeatMean()

      • getLuggageStowDistanceFromSeatDeviation

        double getLuggageStowDistanceFromSeatDeviation()
        Returns the value of the 'Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Deviation' attribute. The default value is "10".

        If the meaning of the 'Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Deviation' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Luggage Stow Distance From Seat Deviation' attribute.
        See Also:
        setLuggageStowDistanceFromSeatDeviation(double), CabinPackage.getLuggageProperties_LuggageStowDistanceFromSeatDeviation()

      • getPercentageOfPassengersWithNoLuggage

        double getPercentageOfPassengersWithNoLuggage()
        Returns the value of the 'Percentage Of Passengers With No Luggage' attribute. The default value is "100".

        If the meaning of the 'Percentage Of Passengers With No Luggage' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Percentage Of Passengers With No Luggage' attribute.
